args.query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.OwnerId FROM Contract AS T1 INNER JOIN Opportunity AS T2 ON REPLACE(T1.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T2.ContractID__c, '#', '') WHERE T1.CompanySignedDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25';

exec_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.OwnerId FROM Contract AS T1 INNER JOIN Opportunity AS T2 ON REPLACE(T1.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T2.ContractID__c, '#', '') WHERE T1.CompanySignedDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25';

args.query: SELECT REPLACE(T2.OwnerId, '#', '') AS OwnerId, SUM(T3.Quantity * T4.UnitPrice) AS TotalSales FROM Contract AS T1 INNER JOIN Opportunity AS T2 ON REPLACE(T1.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T2.ContractID__c, '#', '') INNER JOIN OpportunityLineItem AS T3 ON REPLACE(T2.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T3.OpportunityId, '#', '') INNER JOIN QuoteLineItem AS T4 ON REPLACE(T3.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T4.OpportunityLineItemId, '#', '') WHERE T1.CompanySignedDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25' GROUP BY OwnerId ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT REPLACE(T2.OwnerId, '#', '') AS OwnerId, SUM(T3.Quantity * T4.UnitPrice) AS TotalSales FROM Contract AS T1 INNER JOIN Opportunity AS T2 ON REPLACE(T1.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T2.ContractID__c, '#', '') INNER JOIN OpportunityLineItem AS T3 ON REPLACE(T2.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T3.OpportunityId, '#', '') INNER JOIN QuoteLineItem AS T4 ON REPLACE(T3.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T4.OpportunityLineItemId, '#', '') WHERE T1.CompanySignedDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25' GROUP BY OwnerId ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT REPLACE(T2.OwnerId, '#', '') AS OwnerId, SUM(CAST(T3.Quantity AS REAL) * CAST(T4.UnitPrice AS REAL)) AS TotalSales FROM Contract AS T1 INNER JOIN Opportunity AS T2 ON REPLACE(T1.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T2.ContractID__c, '#', '') INNER JOIN OpportunityLineItem AS T3 ON REPLACE(T2.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T3.OpportunityId, '#', '') INNER JOIN QuoteLineItem AS T4 ON REPLACE(T3.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T4.OpportunityLineItemId, '#', '') WHERE T1.CompanySignedDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25' GROUP BY OwnerId ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT REPLACE(T2.OwnerId, '#', '') AS OwnerId, SUM(CAST(T3.Quantity AS REAL) * CAST(T4.UnitPrice AS REAL)) AS TotalSales FROM Contract AS T1 INNER JOIN Opportunity AS T2 ON REPLACE(T1.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T2.ContractID__c, '#', '') INNER JOIN OpportunityLineItem AS T3 ON REPLACE(T2.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T3.OpportunityId, '#', '') INNER JOIN QuoteLineItem AS T4 ON REPLACE(T3.Id, '#', '') = REPLACE(T4.OpportunityLineItemId, '#', '') WHERE T1.CompanySignedDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25' GROUP BY OwnerId ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 1;
